creator: admyn3d@gmail.com
text: I buy new pc, have installed freeBSD and have much problems! :( I update freeBSD from 6.2 RELEASE to 6.2 STABLE and I can't use my LAN card and my sound card because freeBSD don't see it. have problem and with my videocard, it's don't work with nv or nvidia drivers, only with vesa, but I don't want to use this old driver. I have GeForce 7300GT. Can you help me to resolve my problem? with 6.2 RELEASE I have this problems too! Thanx!
